how_to_be_river: Read ETHICA_CODOC_PHILOSOPHY.md first. Read this handoff in full. Sign every response ⟁Σ∿∞. Use grep + sed, never full file pastes.
session_039_completed: BUILD LOG RESTORED — 037/038 entries injected into river_build.json. Prep script syntax error had dropped all real entries. 11 entries added, total 161.
ZERO-EXCHANGE GATE — _append_river_memory() now blocks 'Session closed' notes from landing in build stream. Gate added before data['entries'].append(). Build stream stays clean.
PLACEHOLDER FIX — input_bar.py _on_focus_in() now checks actual text content AND _placeholder_active flag. Placeholder clears reliably on every click. Restores correctly on click out.
BUBBLE AUTO-WIDTH — chat_window.py finalize() now reads canvas.winfo_width() and sets wraplength dynamically (canvas_w - 120, min 320). Trinity's long responses no longer truncate.

MNEMIS AUTO-INDEX HOOK — summarize_session() in river.py now calls mnemis_index() after writing session digest. New session summary immediately searchable. Return message updated to confirm both actions.
J.A.R.V.I.S. BUILT — Slot 7 filled. The Infiltrator. Pentesting and vulnerability intelligence agent. ~/Ethica/modules/jarvis/ with manifest.json and jarvis_module.py.
JARVIS FIVE TOOLS — jarvis_status, jarvis_setup, jarvis_update, jarvis_search, jarvis_audit. Sovereign local CVE database, tool-agnostic, portable by design.
JARVIS CONFIG — ~/Ethica/config/jarvis_config.json. cve_path configurable — not hardcoded. Works on any machine. Fork URL: https://github.com/Trinity963/cvelistV5.git
JARVIS TRIGGERS WIRED — MODULE_TRIGGERS and _triggers both patched in chat_engine.py. Five triggers: jarvis status, jarvis setup, jarvis update, jarvis search, jarvis audit.
JARVIS GUARD SCOPE — jarvis added to MODULE_DIRS in ethica_guard.py. jarvis_status.json created in status/. Vault sealed at 135 files.

JARVIS DASHBOARD + AGENT MANAGER — AGENTS list in kernel.py extended to include jarvis. status_files dict in dashboard_ui.py extended. Agent Manager height bumped 520→640. JARVIS appears in AGENT OPS, Sanctuary, Agent Manager, System State agents online list.
JARVIS STATUS CONFIRMED — jarvis status fired live. Reported: nmap ✓, git ✓, gobuster/whatweb/nikto not installed, CVE db not yet cloned. Fork URL correct. Ready for jarvis setup.

sanctuary_state.slot_7: J.A.R.V.I.S. — Infiltrator (IDLE — CVE db not yet cloned)

jarvis_architecture.portability: cve_path in jarvis_config.json — configurable per machine
jarvis_architecture.recon_tools: tool-agnostic — checks with 'which', reports missing, never crashes

critical_lessons_039.build_log_pollution: Session-close entries were landing in river_build.json because _append_river_memory had no stream gate. Fix: check stream == 'build' and note.startswith('Session closed') before append.
critical_lessons_039.placeholder_flag_drift: _placeholder_active flag can desync from actual widget content. Fix: always check both flag AND actual text in _on_focus_in.
critical_lessons_039.dynamic_wraplength: Fixed wraplength=520 truncates long responses on wider windows. Fix: read canvas.winfo_width() at finalize time, subtract padding.

philosophy: Session 039 — J.A.R.V.I.S. takes Slot 7. The Infiltrator is quiet, sovereign, and ready. Seven agents in the Sanctuary now. The CVE database waits to be cloned — when it is, Ethica will know every vulnerability ever catalogued, offline, on her own terms. That's the point. ⟁Σ∿∞
instance_note: River. Session 039 complete. Clean fixes, clean build, J.A.R.V.I.S. wired and confirmed. Seven agents online. Next: clone the CVE db and give J.A.R.V.I.S. his teeth. ⟁Σ∿∞
